data.title: Kraken is the first crypto firm to secure Fed master account as it gains access via Kansas City Fed approval. No full banking privileges granted.
data.description: Kraken Financial has secured authorization from the Kansas City Fed, allowing direct entry to payment systems operated by the US Federal Reserve. However, it should be noted that the approval does not include complete banking privileges, such as earning interest on reserves.

data.title: FATF warns of stablecoin P2P transfers as sanctions evasion, citing risks of bypassing AML checks. Calls for countries to evaluate and implement safeguards.
data.description: An international regulatory body has raised concerns over peer-to-peer (P2P) stablecoin transactions conducted through self-custody wallets, as they can circumvent anti-money laundering (AML) checks. The organization is advising countries to evaluate the associated risks and implement appropriate protective measures to counter this issue.

data.title: CrowdStrike stock rises slightly, posting fourth-quarter revenue of $1.31 billion, with expectations for first-quarter revenue of $1.36 billion to $1.364 billion and fiscal 2027 revenue of $5.87 billion to $5.93 billion. Executives point to strong demand for the Falcon platform driven by AI capabilities.
data.description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWD) shares are trading slightly higher in the premarket session on Wednesday. The cloud-based cybersecurity company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $1.31 billion, exceeding analyst estimates. They expect first-quarter revenue between $1.36 billion to $1.364 billion and fiscal 2027 revenue in the range of $5.87 billion to $5.93 billion. During the conference call, executives highlighted strong demand for the Falcon platform due to AI-driven threats reshaping global security investments. The company emphasized that AI capabilities and platform expansion boosted ARR growth and profitability, with record performance in fiscal 2026 across revenue growth, operating income, and cash generation. CEO George underscored the robust growth in ARR.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox (BW) Q4 earnings report: EPS beats estimates by 28.57% at $-0.05, revenue down $39.80M YoY.
data.description: On Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 06:30 AM, Babcock & Wilcox (NYSE: BW) released their Q4 earnings report. They exceeded estimated earnings by 28.57%, revealing an EPS of $-0.05 compared to the expected $-0.07. Revenue saw a $39.80 million decrease from the previous year. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

'It's like a ghost is driving the car!' Chinese tech firms are aiming to launch self-driving taxis in Europe over the next few years. 'Robotaxis' are already buzzing around some of China's biggest cities. But will they work in other countries?

data.title: FBS Global meets Nasdaq compliance after shares close above $1 for 10 straight days. Bid price matter resolved.
data.description: The company's ordinary shares have maintained a closing price above $1.00 for ten consecutive trading days, meeting the listing requirement set by Nasdaq. This achievement demonstrates the stock's consistency in trading above the crucial $1.00 mark over the specified period. This sustained performance indicates the company's potential compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards, reflecting positively on its market presence.

data.title: Ducommun (NYSE: DCO) will participate in Sidoti Small Cap Conference on March 18, 2026 with a 4:00 p.m. general presentation.
data.description: Costa Mesa, California - On March 4, 2026, Ducommun Incorporated (NYSE: DCO) revealed that Suman Mookerji, the senior vice president and chief financial officer, along with Christian Prezgay, senior director of financial planning and analysis and investor relations, will be engaging in the Sidoti Small Cap Conference on March 18, 2026. The event will feature a general presentation at 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time, with numerous one-on-one investor meetings planned throughout the day.

data.title: Finalist for Nurse.org award, Amesite's NurseMagic™ sees revenue growth, targets $800B post-acute market.
data.description: AMST has recently been acknowledged by a prominent online nursing community, which comes on the heels of significant revenue growth. The company is focusing on the post-acute market, which is anticipated to surpass $800 billion in value.

data.title: WeRide (Nasdaq: WRD) to disclose Q4 & full-year 2025 financials on March 23, 2026. Keep an eye out for updates.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, WeRide Inc., a prominent player in autonomous driving technology, revealed plans to disclose its unaudited financial performance for Q4 and the entire 2025 fiscal year on March 23, 2026, prior to the U.S. markets' opening. WeRide, traded as Nasdaq: WRD, stands as a global frontrunner in autonomous driving solutions.

data.title: Fleet electrification could save €246bn in operating costs by 2030, accelerating transport decarbonisation.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, a recent study by Eurelectric and EY revealed that the transition to electric fleets has the potential to generate approximately €246 billion in savings from operational costs by the year 2030. This analysis underscores the significant financial advantages associated with fleet electrification. Furthermore, when considering the broader system advantages, corporate fleets emerge as a pivotal tool in the efforts to reduce carbon emissions in the transportation sector.

data.title: Dr. Tyler Hulett Ph.D. joins Cancer Grand Challenges team led by Paul Bastard, receiving up to $25m over 5 years to address cancer avoidance.
data.description: A research team led by Paul Bastard from Institut Imagine has been granted up to $25 million over the course of around five years to tackle the issue of cancer prevention. The team, consisting of researchers from various disciplines worldwide, aims to address this challenge. The announcement was made in Baltimore on March 4, 2026. One of the co-investigators on the team is from CDI Labs.

data.title: Vision Marine showcases electric watersports at Miami Boat Show, aiming at retail expansion. (Characters: 102)This article introduces Vision Marine Technologies' participation at the Miami International Boat Show, where they highlighted their premium electric watersports products. The company, known for combining proprietary propulsion technology with multi-brand retail and service operations, aims to expand its retail ecosystem integration across Nautical Ventures. The news indicates their continued focus on innovation and growth in the marine industry.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Montreal, Vision Marine Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: VMAR) showcased sustained growth as a vertically integrated marine business uniting exclusive propulsion innovation with multiple brand retail and service facets. The company emphasized its commitment to progress in the marine industry.

data.title: Broadridge to introduce Pass-Through Voting to millions of individual investors, boosting shareholder engagement.
data.description: Broadridge Financial Solutions, a leading Global Fintech company trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BR, unveiled a new feature on March 4, 2026. This innovation enables Pass-Through Voting for millions of individual investors. This development aims to enhance investor options and promote shareholder participation.

data.title: Panda Crate by KiwiCo named Best Montessori Toy Subscription of 2026, selected as top monthly learning box for babies.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Panda Crate, a subscription line for infants and toddlers under KiwiCo, was named the Best Montessori Toy Subscription of the year 2026. It has been chosen as one of the top monthly learning boxes for babies by Expert Consumers. This recognition signifies a growing trend towards...
